name: The Golf House
about: The Golf House is a multi-bay golf simulator venue in Fort Wayne, Indiana. It features Full Swing Pro Series golf simulators and an indoor driving range equipped with Flightscope Mevo+ launch monitors. The venue offers online and walk-in bay reservations, leagues, events, private party packages, and a full-service lounge with food and beverages. Memberships are available for single, dual, and family play, with benefits including discounted simulator time.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Pro Series for premium accuracy
Indoor driving range with FlightScope technology
Full-service bar and lounge for social play
Flexible booking system for individuals and groups

food_and_drink.notes: Full service lounge with snacks available
Full service bar with beverage service

simulator_hardware.notes: 3D Doppler radar launch monitor for indoor range

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can use your own clubs or rent clubs from The Golf House.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The Golf House has a full-service lounge with food and beverage options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically a single player can play 18 holes in one hour, so book extra time for groups.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf House is family-friendly and offers amenities suitable for all ages.
